violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the (dining area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
Leakage observed at plumbing at the handwashing sink in kitchen area. Systems must be maintained and in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
